overall.description: A continuous drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, featuring wet neon-lit streets with purple and orange reflections, towering glass skyscrapers, and light vehicle traffic. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with high-quality atmospheric rendering and ray-traced reflections on the wet asphalt.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a large orange highway overpass on a wet, reflective multi-lane road. The camera moves forward through a futuristic cityscape with palm trees lining the left side and towering glass skyscrapers in the distance. Various vehicles including a green van and red sports car overtake on the left as the scene is bathed in purple and orange neon light.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive yellow pedestrian bridge spanning the street. As the vehicle drives forward, it passes underneath the bridge which features a prominent 'EL GUAPO' billboard. A black SUV overtakes on the left during the approach. The surrounding architecture features modern glass towers with illuminated facades.

segments.scene_description: Having passed the pedestrian bridge, the scene opens into a wider downtown street lined with modern glass structures. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side of the street while glass-enclosed planters line the right sidewalk. Multiple vehicles including a black SUV and blue van pass by on the left as the camera continues forward through the neon-lit environment.

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a large industrial building with elevated train tracks on the right side, where a monorail train is visible. The street continues through the dense urban canyon with towering glass buildings ahead. Vehicles continue to pass on the left as the camera maintains a steady forward motion through the wet, neon-reflecting streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city, transitioning from a sheltered highway underpass into a wide, industrial urban canyon. It begins beneath a massive orange overpass on a wet, reflective road, gliding past palm trees and towering glass skyscrapers while purple and orange lights bathe the passing traffic. As the camera advances, the environment shifts toward a yellow pedestrian bridge featuring a prominent El Guapo billboard, passing underneath it as modern glass towers with illuminated facades close in. The scene then opens into a wider downtown corridor lined with large digital billboards and glass-enclosed planters, with various vehicles weaving through the vibrant glow. Finally, the perspective moves toward a dense urban center where elevated train tracks and a passing monorail appear beside a large industrial building, maintaining a steady course through the rain-slicked streets.
